heading: Reports by the Office of Management and Budget and the Congressional Budget Office
label: 5252 Reports by the Office of Management and Budget and the Congressional Budget Office

children.heading: Reports by the Office of Management and Budget
children.label: a Reports by the Office of Management and Budget

children.text: the estimate, notwithstanding , as of the first business day that is at least 30 days prior to the issuance of the report, of the cost of the troubled assets, and guarantees of the troubled assets, determined in accordance with ;section 661a(5)(F) of title 2section 5232 of this title

the information used to derive the estimate, including assets purchased or guaranteed, prices paid, revenues received, the impact on the deficit and debt, and a description of any outstanding commitments to purchase troubled assets; and
a detailed analysis of how the estimate has changed from the previous report.

children.heading: Reports by the Congressional Budget Office
children.label: b Reports by the Congressional Budget Office

children.text: the cost of the troubled assets and guarantees of the troubled assets,
the information and valuation methods used to calculate such cost, and
the impact on the deficit and the debt.

children.heading: Financial expertise
children.label: c Financial expertise
children.text: In carrying out the duties in this subsection or performing analyses of activities under this chapter, the Director of the Congressional Budget Office may employ personnel and procure the services of experts and consultants.1So in original. Probably should be “section”.1

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to produce reports required by this section.

children.heading: Sunset
children.label: e Sunset
children.text: Notwithstanding the previous provisions of this section, the reporting and comment requirements under this section shall terminate with the annual period on the last day of which all troubled assets acquired by the Secretary under have been sold or transferred out of the ownership or control of the Federal Government.section 5211 of this title
